# Drafting Context: nuxt4-migration-issues

## Goal

Write a comprehensive plan to systematically find ALL visual, functional, and content issues between the live site (https://circusliving.com/) and the local Nuxt 4 migration (http://localhost:3000/).

## Constraints

- Do NOT fix issues — only plan how to find and document them
- Use Playwright MCP and Chrome DevTools MCP for comparison
- Issue list must extend past 20 (no upper limit)
- Cover every page, every component, cross-cutting concerns

## Files Scanned During Research

- All 20 components in `app/components/`
- All 5 page files in `app/pages/`
- All stores, composables, utilities
- `nuxt.config.ts`, `package.json`, SCSS files
- Server API endpoints and utils
- Shared type definitions
